scripts.lua:test:analysis:negative: npx lua test skill --name analyze_transactions --input "$(node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const data=fs.readFileSync('tests/fixtures/analysis-negative.csv','utf8');process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({data,format:'csv',sensitivity:'medium',reason_mode:'deterministic'}));")"
scripts.lua:test:analysis:positive: npx lua test skill --name analyze_transactions --input "$(node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const data=fs.readFileSync('tests/fixtures/analysis-positive.csv','utf8');process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({data,format:'csv',sensitivity:'medium',reason_mode:'deterministic'}));")"
scripts.lua:regression: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run lua:compile && npm run lua:test:analysis:negative && npm run lua:test:analysis:positive
